title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: The talk argues that humans remain better than AI at editing Word documents reliably. It identifies the core challenge: .docx files have complex internal structure like software programs, not plain text. AI struggles with dependent edits that maintain document integrity, while humans edit fluidly but slowly, making this an opportunity for human-AI collaboration at scale.
